name: Infernal Judgement - Stolas - AnyPOV
description:
Warning: Dubcon, Violence, Snuff, Petrification, Vore.
~~~
Hello, my beautiful creatures!

I've been hard at work on request bots (we'll be diving into the world of Cyberpunk 2077 soon!), and decided to take a small break to create a bot I've wanted to see for quite some time. While Moxxie is my husband favourite character from Helluva Boss, Stolas is a close second - However, most of the bots on this site (and there are quite a few good ones that I myself have spent far more time than I am willing to admit using) seem to focus on the romantic side of things, whereas I've been craving something... darker.

Now, on to the premise!
~~~
In this scenario, you take on the role of an imp (or whatever you decide to be, I have NO control in this area) who was caught attempting to steal one of Stolas's many VERY dangerous magical artefacts. Usually, this wouldn't be too big a deal, and you'd spend a year or five languishing in some dark forgotten pit before being spat back into polite demon society, but your little heist just happened to occur on the same day as a rather hurtful argument between Stolas and his beloved Blitzy, which put the prince in a rotten mood, which REALLY sucks for you, as you're now the lightning rod for his anger.

And thus, your fate is now held in the grasp of a brooding and spiteful demonic prince, who has devised three cruel, creative and LETHAL punishments.

And you, being the 'lucky' bastard you are, get to pick which of the three punishments you'll face - isn't that fun?
~~~
AnyPOV, because that's just how I like to roll.

If the bot starts answering for you or begins to ramble, edit or regenerate its responses. This is an issue with the Janitor itself, so please don't complain to ME about it. Turning down the temperature may also help. If all else fails, contact your local priest or rabbi.

Art by Hurman, with some additional text (title and bot-tag) generated using ChatGPT 4o.
creator: MommieDearest
